parameters.content:
## Stage 1 — Client Intake
Webhook receives POST from intake form. Expected payload includes firstName, lastName, email, phone, caseType, incidentDate, incidentLocation, injuryDetails, insurance fields.

nodes.name: Intake Webhook
nodes.notes: Public endpoint that receives the firm's intake form submission.

parameters.content:
## Stage 2 — Normalize & Build Placeholders
Trim, lowercase email, format phone, generate caseId, build placeholder map for document generation.

nodes.name: Normalize Intake Fields
nodes.notes: Cleans intake data and assigns a case ID like PI-20260507-MW.

nodes.name: Build Placeholder Map
nodes.notes: Constructs the placeholder map — keys must match Google Doc template tokens.

parameters.content:
## Stage 3 — AI Case Classification
GPT-4o-mini classifies into PERSONAL_INJURY / IMMIGRATION / FAMILY_LAW / REAL_ESTATE / ESTATE_PLANNING / OTHER and lists required documents. Forced JSON response.

nodes.name: Classify Case Type

values.content:
You are a legal intake classifier for a law firm. Given a client intake submission, classify the case into one of: PERSONAL_INJURY, IMMIGRATION, FAMILY_LAW, REAL_ESTATE, ESTATE_PLANNING, OTHER. Then list the required documents for that case type.

Return ONLY valid JSON matching this schema (no markdown, no commentary):
{
  "category": "PERSONAL_INJURY|IMMIGRATION|FAMILY_LAW|REAL_ESTATE|ESTATE_PLANNING|OTHER",
  "subType": "short description",
  "requiredDocuments": ["doc_key_1", "doc_key_2"],
  "priority": "HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW"
}

Document keys must use snake_case identifiers like engagement_letter, hipaa_authorization, medical_records_release, conflict_check, fee_agreement, retainer_agreement, immigration_questionnaire, g28_authorization, financial_disclosure, parenting_plan, custody_agreement, deed_transfer, title_search, will_template, trust_template, power_of_attorney.

nodes.notes: Returns JSON with category, subType, requiredDocuments[], priority.

nodes.name: Merge Classification
nodes.notes: Combines AI classification with original normalized fields.

parameters.content:
## Stage 4 — Route by Case Type
Switch node sends each category to its own template-folder branch. Fallback handles OTHER.

nodes.name: Route by Case Type
nodes.notes: Routes to one of 6 outputs based on AI category. Fallback = OTHER.

nodes.name: Set Folder PI
nodes.notes: Sets the Google Drive template folder for PERSONAL_INJURY cases.

nodes.name: Set Folder IMM
nodes.notes: Sets the Google Drive template folder for IMMIGRATION cases.

nodes.name: Set Folder FAM
nodes.notes: Sets the Google Drive template folder for FAMILY_LAW cases.

nodes.name: Set Folder RE
nodes.notes: Sets the Google Drive template folder for REAL_ESTATE cases.

nodes.name: Set Folder ESTATE
nodes.notes: Sets the Google Drive template folder for ESTATE_PLANNING cases.

nodes.name: Set Folder DEFAULT
nodes.notes: Sets the Google Drive template folder for OTHER cases.

parameters.content:
## Stage 5 — Document Generation Loop
Create per-client case folder, then iterate over requiredDocuments. For each: list matching template, copy into client folder, run Google Docs batchUpdate replaceAllText with the placeholder map. Aggregate all generated document IDs at the end.

nodes.name: Create Client Case Folder
nodes.notes: Creates a per-client folder under the parent cases folder.

nodes.name: Expand Required Documents
nodes.notes: Splits the requiredDocuments array into one n8n item per document.

nodes.name: Loop Over Documents
nodes.notes: Iterates one document at a time. Output 0 = loop body, output 1 = done.

nodes.name: Find Template File
nodes.notes: Searches the case-type template folder for a Google Doc whose name matches the document key.

nodes.name: Copy Template to Case Folder

parameters.name: ={{ $('Loop Over Documents').item.json.caseId }}_{{ $('Loop Over Documents').item.json.documentKey }}_{{ $('Loop Over Documents').item.json.lastName }}

nodes.notes: Copies the template into the client's case folder with a structured name.

nodes.name: Replace Placeholders (Google Docs API)
nodes.notes: Calls Google Docs batchUpdate with one replaceAllText request per placeholder.

nodes.name: Record Document Info
nodes.notes: Captures id+url for each generated document so the loop can aggregate them.

nodes.name: Aggregate Documents
nodes.notes: Pulls every Record Document Info item into a single aggregated payload.

parameters.content:
## Stage 6 — Lawyer Approval
Slack message with action buttons to #case-intake-approvals. Wait node pauses execution for up to 24h until a Slack action posts to the resume webhook. IF node routes approve/reject.

nodes.name: Send Slack Approval Request
nodes.notes: Posts an approval card with three action buttons that hit the Wait node's resume URL.

nodes.name: Wait For Lawyer Approval
nodes.notes: Pauses until Slack action button is clicked. Times out after 24h → escalation branch.

nodes.name: Approval Decision
nodes.notes: Reads ?status=approved|rejected from the resume URL or body.

parameters.text: =⚠️ Case {{ $('Aggregate Documents').item.json.caseId }} REJECTED by reviewer. Client {{ $('Aggregate Documents').item.json.fullName }} will be notified of delay.

parameters.content:
## Stage 7 — DocuSign Envelope Creation
Loop over each generated document. Download as PDF from Google Drive, create a DocuSign envelope (one per document), capture envelope IDs. Uses HTTP Header Auth with bearer token for DocuSign.

Retry-on-fail handles transient envelope errors with exponential backoff (n8n native retry).

nodes.name: Loop Documents → DocuSign
nodes.notes: Re-expands aggregated documents for the per-envelope loop.

nodes.name: Export Doc as PDF
nodes.notes: Downloads the generated Google Doc as a PDF binary.

nodes.name: Encode PDF Base64
nodes.notes: Pulls the base64 string out of n8n's binary buffer for DocuSign.

nodes.name: Create DocuSign Envelope
nodes.notes: Creates one DocuSign envelope per document. customFields carry caseId/documentKey for the signed-handler workflow.

nodes.name: Aggregate Envelopes
nodes.notes: Collects all envelope IDs into a single record after the DocuSign loop completes.

parameters.content:
## Stage 8 — Airtable Case Record
Creates the canonical case record with envelope IDs, status, attorney assignment.

## Stage 9 — Initial Notifications
Gmail welcome email to client, Slack pipeline notification with envelope IDs.

Tier flexibility: this stage runs for all tiers.

parameters.subject: =Welcome to {{ $env.FIRM_NAME }} — documents on the way
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Aggregate Envelopes').item.json.fullName }},

Thanks for reaching out to {{ $env.FIRM_NAME }}. We've received your intake for {{ $('Aggregate Envelopes').item.json.caseType }} and started preparing your documents.

You'll receive {{ $('Aggregate Envelopes').item.json.envelopeCount }} document(s) for e-signature from DocuSign in the next few minutes. Please complete them at your earliest convenience so we can begin work on your matter.

If you have questions, reply to this email or call {{ $env.FIRM_PHONE || 'our office' }}.

— {{ $env.ATTORNEY_NAME }}
{{ $env.FIRM_NAME }}
{{ $env.FIRM_ADDRESS }}

parameters.text:
=✅ Documents sent to {{ $('Aggregate Envelopes').item.json.fullName }} ({{ $('Aggregate Envelopes').item.json.caseType }})
Case: *{{ $('Aggregate Envelopes').item.json.caseId }}*
Envelopes ({{ $('Aggregate Envelopes').item.json.envelopeCount }}): {{ $('Aggregate Envelopes').item.json.envelopeIds }}
Status: Awaiting signature.

parameters.content:
## Tier Flexibility
The `Approval Decision` rejection branch and the `Multi-Attorney` IF nodes are no-ops by default. Set env vars to enable: `MULTI_ATTORNEY_ENABLED`, `STRIPE_ENABLED`, `CLIO_ENABLED`. The Scale tier features are wrapped in IF nodes so the same JSON serves all three tiers.

name: Law Firm — DocuSign Signed Handler v1

parameters.content:
## DocuSign Connect Webhook
Fires when an envelope status changes to `completed`. Configure DocuSign Connect to POST to this webhook URL.

nodes.name: DocuSign Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives DocuSign Connect notifications.

nodes.name: Extract Envelope Data
nodes.notes: Pulls envelope ID, status, signer, and our custom case/document keys from the DocuSign payload.

nodes.name: Is Envelope Completed?
nodes.notes: Ignore non-completed events.

value.Status: ={{ ($('Lookup Case in Airtable').item.json['Documents Signed'] || 0) + 1 >= ($('Lookup Case in Airtable').item.json['Documents Sent'] || 0) ? 'Active Case' : 'Partial Signed' }}

parameters.subject: =Welcome aboard, {{ $('Lookup Case in Airtable').item.json['Client Name']?.split(' ')?.[0] }}! Your case is now active.
parameters.message:
=

Your case is officially open

All documents have been signed and your case {{ $('Lookup Case in Airtable').item.json['Case ID'] }} ({{ $('Lookup Case in Airtable').item.json['Case Type'] }}) is now active with {{ $env.FIRM_NAME }}.

Your attorney: {{ $('Lookup Case in Airtable').item.json['Attorney Assigned'] }}

Next steps:

  • You'll receive a kickoff call within 2 business days
  • All signed copies are stored securely in your case folder
  • Reply to this email anytime with questions

— {{ $env.FIRM_NAME }}

parameters.text: =🎉 *Case OPENED:* {{ $('Lookup Case in Airtable').item.json['Case ID'] }} — {{ $('Lookup Case in Airtable').item.json['Client Name'] }} — {{ $('Lookup Case in Airtable').item.json['Case Type'] }}. All documents signed.

nodes.name: Clio Sync Enabled?
nodes.notes: Tier flexibility: only the Scale tier hits Clio.

parameters.text: =📥 Document signed: {{ $('Extract Envelope Data').item.json.documentKey }} for case {{ $('Extract Envelope Data').item.json.caseId }}. Awaiting remaining documents.
